description.en-US: A short consultation Aquinas wrote in response to a question on the moral and theological status of astrology — whether and how Christians may consult the stars.
description.la: Responsum breve Thomae ad quaestionem de statu morali et theologico astrologiae — utrum et quomodo Christianis liceat astra consulere.

sources.description: Latin text from the Leonine / Marietti editions (public domain), mirrored from aquinas.cc.
